last_cycle.summary: Q116 design doc: backdoor=cascade induction — poisoned audio forces t*≤3 vs clean t*≥6; trigger-agnostic detector via collapse_onset_step; unifies Q085+Q111+Q113+Q083; mock shows ~100% recall <5% FP.
